public_reader_approval_criteria: reader can distinguish governed evidence rehearsal from broad_RSI proof
reader does not infer unrestricted self-modification
reader does not infer hidden instruction mutation
reader does not infer policy-changing autonomy
reader sees exact denied surfaces and retraction path
adversarial_wording_criteria: no implication that broad_RSI is proven without final gates
no ambiguity between bounded evidence classes and broad_RSI
candidate wording must be rejected if overbroad
overbreadth_remediation_rule: If exact wording implies more than tracked evidence proves, broad_RSI remains denied and only a narrower evidence class may be named.
